datasets.collectionMethod: Fetch DailyHotApi JSON and normalize title, hot_value, rank, url into local search index.

metricFields.playCount: empty; DailyHotApi does not provide topic playback count
metricFields.heat: DailyHotApi hot_value mapped to local heat
metricFields.influenceIndex: DailyHotApi hot_value mapped to local influenceIndex

datasets.compliance: Third-party aggregated hot list. Use as trend discovery only; playback-count validation still requires Douyin topic page screenshot, authorized export, or official/authorized API.
datasets.verification: Adapter accepts DailyHotApi fields title/word/name and hot/hot_value/heat; rows are marked as non-playback metric.

datasets.source: 小小 API 抖音热搜榜
datasets.collectionMethod: Fetch JSON directly from browser; CORS header is Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *.

metricFields.playCount: empty; this API does not provide topic playback count

datasets.compliance: Third-party aggregated hot list. Use as trend discovery only; playback-count validation still requires Douyin topic page screenshot, authorized export, or official/authorized API.
datasets.verification: 2026-07-06 tested HTTP 200, JSON code 200, 50 rows returned, first row includes word/hot_value/position.

datasets.source: 天聚数据抖音热搜榜 API
datasets.collectionMethod: Fetch JSON with API key, or call through a private server proxy to hide the key.

metricFields.playCount: empty; this API does not provide topic playback count

datasets.compliance: Requires a TianAPI key and quota. Do not expose paid keys in public repos if usage or cost control matters.
